---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component, utility, or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the component, API, or behaviour you're proposing. Include a rough API sketch if possible:

```tsx
<NewComponent
  prop="value"
  onAction={() => {}}
/>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, Figma links, related components, or examples from other libraries.
